overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a futuristic black sports car with red neon lights driving through a rainy, neon-lit Night City. The vehicle navigates through downtown streets, underpasses, and intersections surrounded by towering skyscrapers and holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city street with hexagonal yellow building facade

events.description: car accelerates from standstill and begins navigating through traffic
approaching underpass entrance beneath elevated highway

agents.ego_description: driving futuristic sports car through wet city streets, overtaking and maneuvering around other vehicles

notable_agents.action: futuristic silver car overtaking on the left side
futuristic black car driving parallel on the right

massive concrete overpass spanning the street with support columns
large holographic advertisement screen displaying commercial content

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a futuristic black sports car with red neon underglow accelerating along a rain-soaked street. A distinctive yellow hexagonal building dominates the right side while the vehicle maneuvers past other futuristic cars. The camera follows from a stabilized third-person perspective as the car approaches an underpass beneath an elevated highway structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway with industrial support structures

events.description: entering covered underpass beneath elevated highway
exiting underpass into open highway with city skyline view
making a right turn at intersection onto narrower street

agents.ego_description: navigating through underpass and onto elevated highway, executing a right turn at intersection

notable_agents.action: large red industrial truck driving in the opposite direction
person holding an umbrella walking along the sidewalk

entered.detail: massive cylindrical concrete pillars supporting the elevated highway above
metal safety barrier with reflective strips along the elevated road edge
cluster of illuminated skyscrapers visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The car briefly enters a covered underpass with artificial lighting before emerging onto an elevated highway with massive concrete support pillars. The vehicle passes a large red industrial truck and navigates a right turn at an intersection, transitioning from the open highway to a street-level road with pedestrians visible on the sidewalks.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow downtown street with pedestrian sidewalks and storefronts

events.description: slowing down to follow traffic ahead on congested street
approaching second underpass entrance with dark tunnel ahead

agents.ego_description: cruising through narrower city street with pedestrians holding glowing umbrellas on sidewalks

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians with neon-lit umbrellas walking along the sidewalk
futuristic car ahead with brake lights illuminated in traffic

entered.detail: wall covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art
storefront entrance with bright green and yellow neon lighting
dark underpass tunnel entrance with concrete frame

segments.scene_description: Driving through a narrower downtown street lined with pedestrians carrying umbrellas and neon-lit storefronts. The car follows traffic ahead while passing a graffiti-covered wall on the right. The street feels more enclosed with tall buildings on both sides as the vehicle approaches another underpass entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered underpass transitioning to neon-lit building canyon

events.description: entering covered underpass with artificial strip lighting
executing a left turn at intersection immediately after exiting underpass
entering dense urban canyon with towering glass skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: passing through underpass, executing a left turn, and accelerating into neon-lit street canyon

notable_agents.action: futuristic blue sports car parked or moving slowly on the right side of the road

entered.detail: concrete ceiling with fluorescent strip lights illuminating the underpass
large digital billboard displaying a holographic face advertisement
tall skyscraper with illuminated glass windows rising into the fog

segments.scene_description: The car enters a covered underpass with artificial strip lighting before emerging to execute a left turn at an intersection. The scene transitions into a dense urban canyon of tall glass skyscrapers with massive holographic billboards casting colorful reflections on the wet pavement. The vehicle continues through the neon-lit street surrounded by towering futuristic architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement tracking a futuristic black sports car as it navigates from open rain-soaked streets through industrial underpasses and into a dense urban canyon of neon skyscrapers. It begins with the vehicle accelerating past a yellow hexagonal building and maneuvering through traffic toward an elevated highway structure. As the car passes through a covered underpass, the scene opens onto a highway with massive concrete pillars before transitioning via a right turn onto a street-level road populated by pedestrians with umbrellas. The environment then becomes more enclosed, shifting from graffiti-covered walls and narrow storefronts into another artificialy lit tunnel. Finally, the camera emerges from the underpass to execute a left turn, revealing a towering cityscape of glass skyscrapers and massive holographic billboards that cast colorful reflections across the wet pavement.
